---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

:::: hero-wrapper
<h1 class="home-name">

Oluwaseyi Ezekiel

</h1>

<p class="home-tagline">

Geospatial and Remote Sensing Scientist

</p>

::: home-line
:::

<a href="content.html" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg"> View Portfolio </a>
::::
